                stream_from "whatsapp_instance_#{instance.id}" if instance

                          error_payload = { error: response[:error] || response[:message] }
          
      15. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    15. 
            

            

                          error_payload[:details] = response[:details] if response[:details]
          
      16. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    16. 
            

            

                          error!(error_payload, response[:status])
          
      17. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    17. 
            

            

                        end
          
      18. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    18. 
            

            

                      end
          
      19. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    19. 
            

            

                    end
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            

            
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            
              1
            

            

                    before do
          
      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

                      allowed = (defined?(@current_client) && @current_client.present?) || (defined?(@current_user) && @current_user&.og?)
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

                      error!({ error: 'unauthorized', message: 'Acesso negado' }, 401) unless allowed
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

                    end
          
      25.

              ENCHANTMENT_CRITERIA = {
          
      84.

                'understands_goals' => 'O cliente entendeu que nosso objetivo é criar sites únicos e memoráveis no nicho dele?',
          
      85. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    85. 
            

            

                'understands_smart_navigation' => 'O cliente compreendeu o conceito de navegação inteligente e estrutura diferenciada?',
          
      86.

                'understands_complexity' => 'O cliente entendeu a diferença de complexidade entre nossas soluções personalizadas e genéricas como WordPress?',
          
      87. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    87. 
            

            

                'understands_thats_exclusive' => 'O cliente compreendeu que terá um site exclusivo para sua empresa, não adaptado de template?',
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

                'understands_thats_memorable' => 'O cliente concordou que sites personalizados são mais memoráveis que soluções genéricas?',
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

                'likes_some_site' => 'O cliente demonstrou gostar de algum site do nosso portfólio?',
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90.

                'knows_app1_site' => 'O cliente foi apresentado a um site de referência (app1)?',

                'knows_app2_site' => 'O cliente foi apresentado a um segundo site de referência (app2)?',

                'knows_whats_mod' => 'O cliente foi apresentado à integração WhatsApp e suas possibilidades futuras?',

                'knows_own_demand' => 'Identificamos e registramos claramente a demanda específica do cliente para o projeto?'
          
      97.

              def self.enchantment_question(field_name)

                ENCHANTMENT_CRITERIA[field_name.to_s]

              def self.all_criteria

                ENCHANTMENT_CRITERIA.merge(CLOSING_CRITERIA)

              def self.by_any_id(any_id)
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                return nil if any_id.blank?
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

            
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

                any_id_str = any_id.to_s.strip
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

            
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                return find_by(smart_id: any_id_str.upcase) if any_id_str.match?(/\ALD-[A-Z0-9]{10}\z/i)
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

            
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                return find_by(id: any_id_str.to_i) if any_id_str.match?(/\A\d+\z/)
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

            
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

                find_by(session_uuid: any_id_str)
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

              end
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

            
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

              def update_last_interaction!
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                update!(last_interaction_at: Time.current)
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

              end
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

            
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

              def update_last_interaction_with_content!(message_content = nil, message_type = nil, message_id = nil)
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

                attrs = { last_interaction_at: Time.current }
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                if message_content.present?
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                  attrs[:content] = message_content
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            

                  attrs[:content_type] = message_type.presence || 'text'
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

                  attrs[:content_id] = message_id if message_id.present?
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                end
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                update!(attrs)
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

              end
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

            
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

              def advance_level(stage)
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                current_level = send("#{stage}_level")
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                return unless current_level < 5
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

            
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                update!("#{stage}_level" => current_level + 1)
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

              end
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

            
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

              def progress_summary
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                {
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                  discovery: discovery_level,
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                  enchantment: enchantment_level,
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

                  closing: closing_level,
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                  total: discovery_level + enchantment_level + closing_level
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                }
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

              end
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

            
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

              def enchantment_criteria_completed_count
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                ENCHANTMENT_CRITERIA_FIELDS.count { |field| send(field).present? }
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

              end
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

            
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

              def closing_criteria_completed_count
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

                CLOSING_CRITERIA_FIELDS.count { |field| send(field).present? }
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

              end
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

            
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

              def total_criteria_completed_count
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

                enchantment_criteria_completed_count + closing_criteria_completed_count
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

              end
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

            
          
      207.

              before_save :update_criteria_counts
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

            
          
      209.

              def associate_with_operation(operation_id)
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

                operation = Operation.find(operation_id)
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                return false unless operation
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

            
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

                self.operation_id = operation.id
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                self.operation_key = operation.key
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                self.is_categorized = true
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

                save
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

              end
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

            
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

              def associate_with_operation_by_key(operation_key)
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                operation = Operation.find_by(key: operation_key)
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

                return false unless operation
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

            
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

                self.operation_id = operation.id
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

                self.operation_key = operation.key
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            

                self.is_categorized = true
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                save
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

              end
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

            
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

              def dissociate_from_operation
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

                self.operation_id = nil
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

                self.operation_key = nil
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                self.is_categorized = false
          
      233.

    53. 
            

            

                # Verifica múltiplas falhas para o mesmo identificador

                when 'SEND_MESSAGE' then 'Envio de mensagens'

              def extract_base_url

    30. 
            

            

                return '' if url.blank?

                begin
          
      33. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    33. 
            

            

                  # Remove espaços em branco e normaliza a URL
          
      34. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    34. 
            

            

                  clean_url = url.strip
          
      35. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    35. 
            

            

                  return '' if clean_url.blank?
          
      36. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    36. 
            

            

            
          
      37. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    37. 
            

            

                  uri = URI.parse(clean_url)

    38. 
            

            

                  clean_path = uri.path || ''
          
      39. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    39. 
            

            

            
          
      40. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    40. 
            

            

                  events.each do |event|

    41. 
            

            

                    suffix = "/#{event}"
          
      42. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    42. 
            

            

                    if clean_path.downcase.end_with?(suffix)
          
      43. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    43. 
            

            

                      clean_path = clean_path[0...-suffix.length]
          
      44.

                      break
          
      45. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    45. 
            

            

                    end

    46.

    47.

    49. 
            

            

                  clean_path = '/' if clean_path.blank?

    50. 
            

            

            
          
      51. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    51. 
            

            

                  "#{uri.scheme}://#{uri.host}#{uri.port && uri.port != 80 && uri.port != 443 ? ":#{uri.port}" : ''}#{clean_path}"
          
      52. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    52. 
            

            

                rescue URI::InvalidURIError => e
          
      53.

      145.

              def active_login_code
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                login_codes.where('expires_at > ?', Time.current)
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

                           .where(used_at: nil)
          
      157.

    159.

    161. 
            

            

              def can_request_new_code?
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

                last_code = login_codes.order(created_at: :desc).first
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

                return true if last_code.nil?
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

            
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

                # Esperar 30 segundos entre requisições
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                last_code.created_at < 30.seconds.ago
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

              end

              def normalize_email
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                self.email = email.downcase.strip if email.present?
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            

              end
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

            
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

              def normalize_phone
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                self.phone = self.class.normalize_phone_number(phone) if phone.present?
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

              end
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

            
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

              def normalize_cpf_cnpj
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

                self.cpf_cnpj = cpf_cnpj.to_s.gsub(/[^0-9]/, '') if cpf_cnpj.present?
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

              end
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

            
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

              def normalize_cep
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                self.cep = cep.to_s.gsub(/[^0-9]/, '') if cep.present?
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

              end
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

            
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

              def normalize_state
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                self.state = state.to_s.strip.upcase if state.present?
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

              end
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

            
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

              def self.normalize_phone_number(phone)
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                # Normaliza para somente dígitos (sem '+') para compatibilidade com dados existentes
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                phone.to_s.gsub(/[^0-9]/, '')
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

              end
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

            end

              # Scopes

              scope :ordered_by_hierarchy, -> { order(hierarchy_level: :asc) }
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            

              scope :higher_than, ->(level) { where('hierarchy_level < ?', level) }
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            

            

              scope :lower_than, ->(level) { where('hierarchy_level > ?', level) }

              def self.og

                where('LOWER(name) = ?', 'og').first

              def normalize_range(period, date_from, date_to)
          
      73. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    73. 
            

            

                to = date_to || Time.current
          
      74. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    74. 
            

            

                from = date_from || begin

    75. 
            

            

                  case period
          
      76. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    76. 
            

            

                  when 'day' then to.beginning_of_day

    77. 
            

            

                  when 'week' then (to - 7.days)
          
      78. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    78. 
            

            

                  when 'month' then to.beginning_of_month
          
      79. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    79. 
            

            

                  when 'quarter' then (to - 3.months)
          
      80. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    80. 
            

            

                  when 'year' then to.beginning_of_year

    81. 
            

            

                  else (to - 30.days)
          
      82. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    82.

              def scoped_relation(relation, from, to)
          
      88. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    88. 
            

            

                relation.where(created_at: from..to)
          
      89. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    89. 
            

            

              end
          
      90. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    90. 
            

            

            
          
      91. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    91. 
            

            

              def sales_monthly_series(date_from, date_to)
          
      92. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    92. 
            

            

                purchases = scoped_relation(Purchase.all, date_from, date_to)
          
      93. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    93. 
            

            

                subs = scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to)
          
      94. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    94. 
            

            

                buckets = Hash.new(0.0)
          
      95. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    95. 
            

            

                (purchases + subs).each do |r|
          
      96. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    96. 
            

            

                  key = r.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m')
          
      97. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    97. 
            

            

                  buckets[key] += (r.respond_to?(:value) ? r.value.to_f : 0.0)
          
      98. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    98. 
            

            

                end
          
      99. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    99. 
            

            

                labels = months_range(date_from, date_to)
          
      100. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    100. 
            

            

                values = labels.map { |k| (buckets[k] || 0.0).round(2) }
          
      101. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    101. 
            

            

                { labels: labels, values: values }
          
      102. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    102. 
            

            

              end
          
      103. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    103. 
            

            

            
          
      104. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    104. 
            

            

              def subscriptions_growth_series(date_from, date_to)
          
      105. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    105. 
            

            

                subs = scoped_relation(Subscription.all.order(:created_at), date_from, date_to)
          
      106. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    106. 
            

            

                count_by_month = Hash.new(0)
          
      107. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    107. 
            

            

                subs.each do |s|
          
      108. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    108. 
            

            

                  key = s.created_at.strftime('%Y-%m')
          
      109. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    109. 
            

            

                  count_by_month[key] += 1
          
      110. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    110. 
            

            

                end
          
      111. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    111. 
            

            

                labels = months_range(date_from, date_to)
          
      112. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    112. 
            

            

                cumulative = []
          
      113. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    113. 
            

            

                total = 0
          
      114. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    114. 
            

            

                labels.each do |k|
          
      115. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    115. 
            

            

                  total += count_by_month[k]
          
      116. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    116. 
            

            

                  cumulative << total
          
      117. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    117. 
            

            

                end
          
      118. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    118. 
            

            

                { labels: labels, values: cumulative }
          
      119. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    119. 
            

            

              end
          
      120. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    120. 
            

            

            
          
      121. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    121. 
            

            

              def leads_distribution_by_source(date_from, date_to)
          
      122. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    122. 
            

            

                counts = scoped_relation(Lead.all, date_from, date_to).group(:source_type).count
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            

            

                total = counts.values.sum.nonzero? || 1
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            

            

                distribution = counts.map { |src, c| { label: src, value: c, percent: (c.to_f / total.to_f).round(4) } }
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            

            

                { labels: distribution.map { |d| d[:label] }, values: distribution.map { |d| d[:value] }, details: distribution }
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            

            

              end
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            

            

            
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            

            

              def compute_top_products(date_from, date_to, params)
          
      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            

            

                purchases = scoped_relation(Purchase.all, date_from, date_to).group(:plan_name).sum(:value)
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130. 
            

            

                items = purchases.map { |name, amount| { name: name, amount: amount.to_f } }
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            

            

                ranked = items.sort_by { |i| -i[:amount] }.each_with_index.map { |i, idx| i.merge(rank: idx + 1, volume: i[:amount]) }
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            

            

                ranked
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            

            

              end
          
      134. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    134. 
            

            

            
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135. 
            

            

              def compute_lead_conversion_by_channel(date_from, date_to, params)
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            

            

                total_by_src = scoped_relation(Lead.all, date_from, date_to).group(:source_type).count
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            

            

                converted_by_src = scoped_relation(Lead.where(current_stage: 'closing'), date_from, date_to).group(:source_type).count
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            

            

                channels = total_by_src.keys | converted_by_src.keys
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            

            

                channels.map do |ch|
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            

                  total = total_by_src[ch].to_i
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            

                  conv = converted_by_src[ch].to_i
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            

                  rate = total.zero? ? 0.0 : (conv.to_f / total.to_f)
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            

                  { channel: ch, leads: total, converted: conv, rate: rate.round(4) }
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            

                end.sort_by { |r| -r[:rate] }
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            

              end
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            

            
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            

              def compute_metrics_summary(date_from, date_to)
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            

                charges = scoped_relation(Purchase.all, date_from, date_to).sum(:value).to_f + scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).sum(:value).to_f
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                leads_total = scoped_relation(Lead.all, date_from, date_to).count.to_f.nonzero? || 1.0
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                cac = (charges.zero? ? 0.0 : (charges / leads_total)).round(2)
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            

                ltv = (scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).average(:value) || 0.0).to_f * 12
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            

                retention_rate = (scoped_relation(Subscription.where(status: 'ACTIVE'), date_from, date_to).count.to_f / (scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).count.nonzero? || 1)).round(4)
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                arpu = (charges / (scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).count.nonzero? || 1)).round(2)
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                { cac: cac, ltv: ltv.round(2), retention_rate: retention_rate, arpu: arpu }
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

              end
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

            
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

              def compute_kpis_realtime
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                total_sales = Purchase.sum(:value).to_f + Subscription.sum(:value).to_f
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                new_subscriptions = Subscription.where('created_at >= ?', 24.hours.ago).count
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

                leads_converted = Lead.where(current_stage: 'closing').where('updated_at >= ?', 24.hours.ago).count
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                { total_sales: total_sales.round(2), new_subscriptions: new_subscriptions, leads_converted: leads_converted }
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

              end
          
      163.

      164.

                    count: Purchase.count,

              def leads_summary

              def transactions_count(date_from, date_to)
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

                scoped_relation(Purchase.all, date_from, date_to).count + scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).count
          
      190.

              def compute_kpis_changes(date_from, date_to)
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                # Calcula percentuais de variação entre o período atual e o período imediatamente anterior
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                duration = (date_to - date_from)
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                prev_from = date_from - duration
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                prev_to = date_from
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

            
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                current_sales = scoped_relation(Purchase.all, date_from, date_to).sum(:value).to_f + scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).sum(:value).to_f
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                prev_sales = scoped_relation(Purchase.all, prev_from, prev_to).sum(:value).to_f + scoped_relation(Subscription.all, prev_from, prev_to).sum(:value).to_f
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

            
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

                current_subs = scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).count
          
      202. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    202. 
            

            

                prev_subs = scoped_relation(Subscription.all, prev_from, prev_to).count
          
      203. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    203. 
            

            

            
          
      204. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    204. 
            

            

                current_leads_conv = scoped_relation(Lead.where(current_stage: 'closing'), date_from, date_to).count
          
      205. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    205. 
            

            

                prev_leads_conv = scoped_relation(Lead.where(current_stage: 'closing'), prev_from, prev_to).count
          
      206. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    206. 
            

            

            
          
      207. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    207. 
            

            

                current_tx = transactions_count(date_from, date_to)
          
      208. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    208. 
            

            

                prev_tx = transactions_count(prev_from, prev_to)
          
      209. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    209. 
            

            

            
          
      210. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    210. 
            

            

                {
          
      211. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    211. 
            

            

                  total_sales_change_pct: pct_change(current_sales, prev_sales),
          
      212. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    212. 
            

            

                  subscriptions_change_pct: pct_change(current_subs, prev_subs),
          
      213. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    213. 
            

            

                  leads_converted_change_pct: pct_change(current_leads_conv, prev_leads_conv),
          
      214. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    214. 
            

            

                  transactions_change_pct: pct_change(current_tx, prev_tx)
          
      215. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    215. 
            

            

                }
          
      216. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    216. 
            

            

              end
          
      217. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    217. 
            

            

            
          
      218. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    218. 
            

            

              def pct_change(current, previous)
          
      219. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    219. 
            

            

                return 0.0 if previous.to_f <= 0.0
          
      220. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    220. 
            

            

                (((current.to_f - previous.to_f) / previous.to_f) * 100.0).round(2)
          
      221. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    221. 
            

            

              end
          
      222. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    222. 
            

            

            
          
      223. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    223. 
            

            

              def months_range(date_from, date_to)
          
      224. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    224. 
            

            

                start_date = date_from.to_date.beginning_of_month
          
      225. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    225. 
            

            

                end_date = date_to.to_date.beginning_of_month
          
      226. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    226. 
            

            

                months = []
          
      227. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    227. 
            

            

                d = start_date
          
      228. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    228. 
            

            

                while d <= end_date
          
      229. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    229. 
            

            

                  months << d.strftime('%Y-%m')
          
      230. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    230. 
            

            

                  d = d.next_month
          
      231. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    231. 
            

            

                end
          
      232. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    232. 
            

            

                months
          
      233. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    233. 
            

            

              end
          
      234. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    234. 
            

            

            
          
      235. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    235. 
            

            

              def conversion_rates(date_from, date_to)
          
      236. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    236. 
            

            

                leads_total = scoped_relation(Lead.all, date_from, date_to).count.to_f
          
      237. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    237. 
            

            

                purchases_done = scoped_relation(Purchase.where(status: 'DONE'), date_from, date_to).count.to_f
          
      238. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    238. 
            

            

                subscriptions_new = scoped_relation(Subscription.all, date_from, date_to).count.to_f
          
      239. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    239. 
            

            

                purchases_pct = leads_total > 0 ? ((purchases_done / leads_total) * 100.0) : 0.0
          
      240. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    240. 
            

            

                subscriptions_pct = leads_total > 0 ? ((subscriptions_new / leads_total) * 100.0) : 0.0
          
      241. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    241. 
            

            

                {
          
      242. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    242. 
            

            

                  purchases_pct: [[purchases_pct.round(2), 0.0].max, 100.0].min,
          
      243. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    243. 
            

            

                  subscriptions_pct: [[subscriptions_pct.round(2), 0.0].max, 100.0].min
          
      244. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    244. 
            

            

                }
          
      245. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    245. 
            

            

              end
          
      246. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    246. 
            

            

            
          
      247. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    247.

                lines = []

                lines << 'Section;Label;Value'

    250. 
            

            

                data[:sales_monthly][:labels].each_with_index do |lab, idx|
          
      251. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    251. 
            

            

                  lines << "Sales Monthly;#{lab};#{data[:sales_monthly][:values][idx]}"
          
      252. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    252. 
            

            

                end
          
      253. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    253. 
            

            

                data[:subscriptions_growth][:labels].each_with_index do |lab, idx|

    254. 
            

            

                  lines << "Subscriptions Growth;#{lab};#{data[:subscriptions_growth][:values][idx]}"
          
      255. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    255. 
            

            

                end
          
      256. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    256. 
            

            

                data[:leads_distribution][:details].each do |d|
          
      257. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    257. 
            

            

                  lines << "Leads Distribution;#{d[:label]};#{d[:value]}"
          
      258. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    258. 
            

            

                end
          
      259. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    259. 
            

            

                data[:top_products].each do |p|
          
      260. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    260. 
            

            

                  lines << "Top Products;#{p[:name]};#{p[:amount]}"
          
      261. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    261. 
            

            

                end
          
      262. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    262. 
            

            

                data[:lead_conversion_by_channel].each do |c|
          
      263. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    263. 
            

            

                  lines << "Lead Conversion;#{c[:channel]};#{c[:rate]}"
          
      264. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    264. 
            

            

                end
          
      265. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    265. 
            

            

                lines << "Metrics;CAC;#{data[:metrics_summary][:cac]}"
          
      266. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    266. 
            

            

                lines << "Metrics;LTV;#{data[:metrics_summary][:ltv]}"
          
      267. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    267. 
            

            

                lines << "Metrics;Retention;#{data[:metrics_summary][:retention_rate]}"
          
      268. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    268. 
            

            

                lines << "Metrics;ARPU;#{data[:metrics_summary][:arpu]}"
          
      269. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    269. 
            

            

                lines.join("\n")
          
      270. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    270. 
            

            

              end

            # Service responsável por criar/retomar sessão após conclusão de checkout

            # Regras de negócio:
          
      5.

            # - Se a compra foi concluída e o usuário ainda não está logado no cliente,

              class CheckoutSessionService

                # Executa a criação/retomada de sessão pós‑checkout

                # Parâmetros aceitos:

                def execute!(payment_id: nil, asaas_id: nil, purchase_identifier: nil, subscription_id: nil, subscription_identifier: nil)
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            

                  # Tenta localizar compra (one-time) ou assinatura (recorrente)
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21. 
            

            

                  purchase = find_purchase(payment_id: payment_id, asaas_id: asaas_id, identifier: purchase_identifier)
          
      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

                  subscription = find_subscription(asaas_id: subscription_id, identifier: subscription_identifier)
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

                  if subscription
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

                    return process_subscription(subscription)
          
      25. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    25. 
            

            

                  end
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            

            
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            

                  return not_found_response('Purchase') unless purchase
          
      28. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    28. 
            

            

                  # Aceita compras já confirmadas ou PIX aguardando confirmação (será concluída via webhook)
          
      29. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    29. 
            

            

                  return validation_error_response('Compra ainda não confirmada') unless purchase.status == 'DONE'
          
      30. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    30. 
            

            

            
          
      31. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    31.

                def account_existed_before_subscription?(subscription:, user:)
          
      123. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    123. 
            

            

                  # Heurística: considera existente se o usuário foi criado antes da assinatura
          
      124. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    124. 
            

            

                  user.created_at <= subscription.created_at - 2.minutes
          
      125. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    125. 
            

            

                end
          
      126. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    126. 
            

            

            
          
      127. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    127. 
            

            

                # Heurística para saber se a conta já existia antes da compra
          
      128. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    128. 
            

            

                # Ajuste: usa uma janela de segurança de 2 minutos para não classificar
          
      129. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    129. 
            

            

                # como "existente" um usuário criado durante o próprio fluxo de checkout.
          
      130. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    130. 
            

            

                # Assim, contas recém‑criadas recebem autologin.
          
      131. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    131. 
            

            

                def account_existed_before_purchase?(purchase:, user:)
          
      132. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    132. 
            

            

                  return false unless user && purchase
          
      133. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    133. 
            

            

            
          
      134. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    134. 
            

            

                  # Se o usuário foi criado próximo/apos a compra, tratamos como novo
          
      135. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    135. 
            

            

                  return false if user.created_at >= (purchase.created_at - 2.minutes)
          
      136. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    136. 
            

            

            
          
      137. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    137. 
            

            

                  # Para casos em que o usuário pré‑existente é encontrado por e‑mail/telefone
          
      138. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    138. 
            

            

                  buyer_email = purchase.consumer_email&.to_s&.strip&.downcase
          
      139. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    139. 
            

            

                  buyer_phone = purchase.consumer_whatsapp&.to_s&.gsub(/\D/, '')
          
      140. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    140. 
            

            

            
          
      141. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    141. 
            

            

                  found_by_email = buyer_email.present? ? User.by_email(buyer_email).first : nil
          
      142. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    142. 
            

            

                  found_by_phone = buyer_phone.present? ? User.by_phone(buyer_phone).first : nil
          
      143. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    143. 
            

            

            
          
      144. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    144. 
            

            

                  candidate = found_by_email || found_by_phone || user
          
      145. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    145. 
            

            

                  candidate.created_at <= (purchase.created_at - 2.minutes)
          
      146. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    146. 
            

            

                end
          
      147. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    147. 
            

            

            
          
      148. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    148. 
            

            

                # Atualiza campos do usuário com informações disponíveis do checkout
          
      149. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    149. 
            

            

                # Quando skip_sensitive=true, não altera email/whatsapp
          
      150. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    150. 
            

            

                def update_user_from_purchase(user, purchase, skip_sensitive: false)
          
      151. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    151. 
            

            

                  data = extract_buyer_data(purchase)
          
      152. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    152. 
            

            

            
          
      153. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    153. 
            

            

                  # Sempre garantir user_type client
          
      154. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    154. 
            

            

                  client_type = UserType.find_by(name: 'client')
          
      155. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    155. 
            

            

                  user.user_type_id ||= client_type&.id
          
      156. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    156. 
            

            

            
          
      157. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    157. 
            

            

                  # Nome e documento
          
      158. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    158. 
            

            

                  user.name = data[:name] if data[:name].present?
          
      159. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    159. 
            

            

                  user.cpf_cnpj = data[:cpf_cnpj] if data[:cpf_cnpj].present?
          
      160. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    160. 
            

            

            
          
      161. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    161. 
            

            

                  # Sensíveis
          
      162. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    162. 
            

            

                  unless skip_sensitive
          
      163. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    163. 
            

            

                    user.email ||= data[:email] if data[:email].present?
          
      164. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    164. 
            

            

                    normalized_phone = data[:whatsapp].to_s.gsub(/\D/, '')
          
      165. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    165. 
            

            

                    user.phone ||= normalized_phone if normalized_phone.present?
          
      166. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    166. 
            

            

                  end
          
      167. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    167. 
            

            

            
          
      168. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    168. 
            

            

                  # Endereço e cardholder quando disponíveis
          
      169. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    169. 
            

            

                  user.cep = data[:cardholder_postal_code] if data[:cardholder_postal_code].present?
          
      170. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    170. 
            

            

                  user.number = data[:cardholder_address_number] if data[:cardholder_address_number].present?
          
      171. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    171. 
            

            

                  user.cardholder_name = data[:cardholder_name] if data[:cardholder_name].present?
          
      172. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    172. 
            

            

                  user.cardholder_email = data[:email] if data[:email].present?
          
      173. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    173. 
            

            

                  user.cardholder_cpf_cnpj = data[:cpf_cnpj] if data[:cpf_cnpj].present?
          
      174. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    174. 
            

            

            
          
      175. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    175. 
            

            

                  # Associação de customer_id (Asaas)
          
      176. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    176. 
            

            

                  user.customer_id ||= purchase.customer_id if purchase.customer_id.present?
          
      177. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    177. 
            

            

            
          
      178. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    178. 
            

            

                  user.save!
          
      179. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    179. 
            

            

                end
          
      180. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    180. 
            

            

            
          
      181. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    181. 
            

            

                # Extrai dados do comprador do objeto purchase (payment_data/asaas_data/consumer_*)
          
      182. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    182. 
            

            

                def extract_buyer_data(purchase)
          
      183. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    183. 
            

            

                  base = {
          
      184. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    184. 
            

            

                    name: purchase.consumer_name,
          
      185. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    185. 
            

            

                    email: purchase.consumer_email,
          
      186. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    186. 
            

            

                    whatsapp: purchase.consumer_whatsapp,
          
      187. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    187. 
            

            

                    cpf_cnpj: purchase.consumer_cpf_cnpj
          
      188. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    188. 
            

            

                  }
          
      189. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    189. 
            

            

            
          
      190. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    190. 
            

            

                  pd = purchase.payment_data.is_a?(Hash) ? purchase.payment_data : {}
          
      191. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    191. 
            

            

                  buyer = pd['buyer'] || {}
          
      192. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    192. 
            

            

                  cardholder = {
          
      193. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    193. 
            

            

                    cardholder_name: buyer['cardholder_name'],
          
      194. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    194. 
            

            

                    cardholder_postal_code: buyer['cardholder_postal_code'],
          
      195. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    195. 
            

            

                    cardholder_address_number: buyer['cardholder_address_number']
          
      196. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    196. 
            

            

                  }
          
      197. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    197. 
            

            

            
          
      198. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    198. 
            

            

                  base.merge(cardholder).transform_keys(&:to_sym)
          
      199. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    199. 
            

            

                end
          
      200. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    200. 
            

            

              end
          
      201. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    201. 
            

            

            end
          
      202.

                def execute!
          
      16.

      18. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    18. 
            

            

                  # Buscar código válido

    19. 
            

            

                  login_code = LoginCode.where(
          
      20. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    20. 
            

            

                    destination: normalized_identifier,
          
      21. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    21.

      22. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    22. 
            

            

                    code: @code
          
      23. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    23. 
            

            

                  ).where('expires_at > ?', Time.current).where(used_at: nil).order(created_at: :desc).first
          
      24. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    24. 
            

            

            
          
      25. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    25. 
            

            

                  unless login_code
          
      26. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    26. 
            

            

                    create_login_attempt(success: false)
          
      27. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    27. 
            

            

                    return unauthorized_response('Código inválido ou expirado')
          
      28.

                  # Verificar limite de tentativas
          
      31.

                  if login_code.attempts >= 5
          
      32.

                    login_code.destroy!
          
      33.

      34.

                  # Incrementar tentativas

    37.

            # LÓGICA CORRIGIDA V2:
          
      6. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    6. 
            

            

            # - Na CRIAÇÃO: API usa source_type para saber que campo comparar automaticamente
          
      7. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    7. 
            

            

            #   * Instagram (source_type) → busca leads com ig_username = source_id
          
      8. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    8. 
            

            

            #   * WhatsApp/WABA (source_type) → busca leads com phone = source_id
          
      9.

    10. 
            

            

            #

    11. 
            

            

            # Fluxo de match na criação:

    12. 
            

            

            # 1. MATCH EXATO (source_type + source_id idênticos) - sempre prioritário
          
      13. 
        
      
      
        
      
          
    13.

    14.
